pi_items.source: setup_task.sh downloads the PDB structure directly from https://files.rcsb.org/download/6EQE.pdb
export_result.sh outputs the results to this exact path and verifier.py reads from it.
export_result.sh explicitly checks for the figure at this path.
export_result.sh explicitly checks for the report at this path.
verifier.py strictly enforces a minimum figure size of 30,000 bytes.
verifier.py explicitly checks the distance against this minimum bound. The true Ser160(OG) to His237(NE2) distance calculated from the PDB file is ~2.94 Angstroms, which fits inside.
verifier.py explicitly checks the distance against this maximum bound. The true Ser160(OG) to His237(NE2) distance calculated from the PDB file is ~2.94 Angstroms, which fits inside.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves analyzing the real IsPETase structure (PDB: 6EQE) downloaded directly from the RCSB PDB. Independent programmatic analysis of the 6EQE.pdb file confirms that the catalytic triad consists of Ser160, Asp206, and His237, and that Trp185 is present. The true distance between Ser160 (OG) and His237 (NE2) was mathematically calculated to be 2.9444 Angstroms, which falls within the expected 2.2 to 4.2 Angstroms valid range specified by the verifier. All file path expectations and the 30KB minimum figure size threshold explicitly match the setup, export, and verifier scripts.
